rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisal limits. Educ. Code §37.028 prohibits state funding penalties tied to student disciplinary actions. These provisions operate in unrelated domains with no interaction.
quote: The agency may not withhold any state funding or impose a penalty on a school district based on the number of students in the district that have been removed from a classroom, placed into in-school or out-of-school suspension, placed in a disciplinary alternative education program or a juvenile justice alternative education program, or expelled.
_note: No conflict identified. The rule addresses school discipline funding penalties; the proposed change addresses property tax homestead exemptions. No statutory or constitutional interaction found.
